---
title: "DMRsegal Capabilities Notebook on dmrsegaldata (Benchmark Results)"
author: "DMRsegal Package"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  BiocStyle::html_document:
    code_folding: hide
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{DMRsegal Capabilities Notebook on dmrsegaldata (Benchmark Results)}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
    echo = TRUE,
    warning = FALSE,
    message = FALSE,
    fig.width = 12,
    fig.height = 8,
    dpi = 300
)
```

## Goal

This notebook showcases the main DMRsegal capabilities on the `dmrsegaldata` benchmark dataset while reusing the precomputed benchmark DMR results.

## Setup

```{r setup}
if (requireNamespace("devtools", quietly = TRUE)) {
    devtools::load_all(quiet = TRUE)
}

library(DMRsegal)
library(GenomicRanges)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)

output_dir <- "dmrsegaldata"
if (!dir.exists(output_dir)) {
    dir.create(output_dir, recursive = TRUE)
}

genome <- "hg19"
```

## Load Example Inputs and Benchmark DMRs

```{r load_inputs_and_dmrs}
beta <- loadExampleInputData("beta")
pheno <- loadExampleInputData("pheno")
array_type <- loadExampleInputData("array_type")
dmps <- loadExampleInputData("dmps")

beta_handler <- getBetaHandler(beta, array = array_type, genome = genome)

benchmark_dmrs_file <- file.path(output_dir, "dmrs.DMRsegal.rds")
stopifnot(file.exists(benchmark_dmrs_file))
dmrs <- readRDS(benchmark_dmrs_file)

cat(sprintf("Benchmark DMRsegal DMRs loaded: %d\n", length(dmrs)))
```

## DMR Summary and Ranking

```{r}
stopifnot(length(dmrs) > 0)

if (!"rank" %in% colnames(mcols(dmrs)) || !"accuracy" %in% colnames(mcols(dmrs))) {
    options(DMRsegal.ranking_nfold = 3)
    dmrs <- rankDMRs(
        dmrs = dmrs,
        beta = beta_handler,
        pheno = pheno,
        genome = genome,
        array = array_type,
        sample_group_col = "Sample_Group"
    )
}

summary_tbl <- data.frame(
    chr = as.character(seqnames(dmrs)),
    start = start(dmrs),
    end = end(dmrs),
    width = width(dmrs),
    seeds_num = mcols(dmrs)$seeds_num,
    cpgs_num = mcols(dmrs)$cpgs_num,
    delta_beta = round(mcols(dmrs)$delta_beta, 4),
    accuracy = round(mcols(dmrs)$accuracy, 4),
    rank = mcols(dmrs)$rank
)
summary_tbl <- summary_tbl[order(summary_tbl$rank), ]
knitr::kable(head(summary_tbl, 20), caption = "Top ranked DMRs from benchmark results")
```

## Motif Discovery

```{r motif_discovery}
motif_dmrs <- extractDMRMotifs(
    dmrs = seq_regions,
    genome = genome,
    array = array_type,
    flank_size = 5
)

n_motif_consensus <- sum(!is.na(mcols(motif_dmrs)$consensus_seq))
n_unique_motif_consensus <- length(unique(stats::na.omit(mcols(motif_dmrs)$consensus_seq)))
cat(sprintf("Motifs extracted for %d/%d DMRs.\n", n_motif_consensus, length(motif_dmrs)))
cat(sprintf("Unique motif consensus sequences: %d\n", n_unique_motif_consensus))
```

## Motif-Based DMR Interactions

```{r dmrs_interactions}
interaction_results <- computeDMRsInteraction(
    dmrs = motif_dmrs,
    genome = genome,
    array = array_type,
    min_sim = 0.8,
    flank_size = 5,
    min_component_size = 2,
    query_components_with_jaspar = FALSE
)

interaction_tbl <- interaction_results$interactions
component_tbl <- interaction_results$components

cat(sprintf("Interactions found: %d\n", nrow(interaction_tbl)))
cat(sprintf("Components found: %d\n", nrow(component_tbl)))

if (nrow(interaction_tbl) > 0) {
    knitr::kable(
        head(interaction_tbl[order(-interaction_tbl$sim), ], 20),
        caption = "Top motif-similarity DMR interactions"
    )
}

if (nrow(component_tbl) > 0) {
    components_tbl <- component_tbl |>
        dplyr::mutate(indices = vapply(indices, function(x) paste(x, collapse = ","), character(1))) |>
        dplyr::select(component_id, size, consensus_seq, indices) |>
        dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(size))
    if (nrow(components_tbl) > 0) {
        knitr::kable(head(components_tbl, 20), caption = "Motif interaction components")
    }
}
```

## Visualizations

### Single DMR Plot

```{r single_dmr_plot, fig.height=12}
plotDMR(
    dmrs = seq_regions,
    dmr_index = 1,
    beta = beta_handler,
    pheno = pheno,
    sample_group_col = "Sample_Group",
    genome = genome,
    array = array_type,
    motif_flank_size = 5
)
```

### Summary Circos Plot

```{r circos_plot, fig.height=20, fig.width=20}
circos_dmrs <- motif_dmrs
if ("rank" %in% colnames(mcols(circos_dmrs))) {
    # Keep circos interaction components undirected/connected for robust link plotting.
    mcols(circos_dmrs)$rank <- NULL
}

tryCatch(
    {
        plotDMRsCircos(
            dmrs = circos_dmrs,
            beta = beta_handler,
            pheno = pheno,
            genome = genome,
            array = array_type,
            sample_group_col = "Sample_Group",
            min_sim = 0.8,
            flank_size = 5,
            max_num_samples_per_group = 5,
            max_dmrs_per_chr = 50,
            max_cpgs_per_dmr = 5,
            max_interactions = 1000000,
            degenerate_resolution = 1e6,
            verbose = 1
        )
    },
    error = function(e) {
        message("Circos plot generation failed: ", conditionMessage(e))
        NULL
    }
)
```

## Session Info

```{r session_info}
sessionInfo()
```
